overview.description: AI-powered real estate market data and dynamic pricing platform for residential developers and investors
overview.description_long: BuiltMind provides data-driven solutions for the real estate industry, offering Market Data (real-time competitor monitoring and market analytics), Dynamic Pricing (AI-powered price optimization using up to 120 variables), and BuiltMind AI (generative AI for market analysis powered by GPT-4). Founded with the mission to accelerate data-driven decision-making in real estate. First prototype built at Harvard University; operates in the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Poland, Germany, and the USA.

history.origin_story: First prototype built at Harvard University; BuiltMind Inc. incorporated as a US company with European operations focused on the Czech, Slovak, Polish and German real estate markets.

key_milestones.event: 2nd place at MIPIM startup competition (world's largest real estate conference)
Launched BuiltMind AI (GPT-4-powered market analysis) in beta
Top 10 at PropTech Festival, Property Forum 2025

metadata.notes: BuiltMind Inc. is legally a US entity but has primary European operations centred on Prague. Founded year estimated as 2022 based on MIPIM competition mention; prototype built at Harvard before that. Employee count (18) from LinkedIn profile as of March 2026.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Domain-specific focus (data_engineering) with proprietary tech or established customer base provides moat against foundation model commoditization.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established customer base with proven market demand.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public funding information. Sustainability unclear.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong position across assessed risk dimensions with clear moats or stability factors.
